description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

subcriteria.name: vendor_risk_assessment
subcriteria.reference_text: Vendor risk assessment performed for all vendors with access to sensitive data or critical systems. Security questionnaire or assessment sent to vendors annually. Vendor SOC 2 reports, ISO certifications, or penetration test results reviewed. Risk rating assigned to each vendor.

subcriteria.name: vendor_agreements
subcriteria.reference_text: Vendor agreements include security requirements, data handling obligations, breach notification terms, and compliance commitments. NDAs, data processing agreements, and business associate agreements executed. Service levels and performance metrics defined.

subcriteria.name: vendor_monitoring
subcriteria.reference_text: Ongoing vendor performance and risk monitoring. Annual reassessment of critical vendor risk. Vendor inventory maintained listing all third parties with data access. Procedures for terminating vendor relationships and revoking access upon contract end.

subcriteria.name: vendor_offboarding
subcriteria.reference_text: Procedures for terminating vendor relationships when necessary. Vendor access removed upon contract termination. Data return or destruction confirmed. Offboarding checklist completed.

mismatch_signals.reason: Employee lifecycle management is not vendor risk management.
Change management is CC8.1, not vendor risk management.
